title: Chunk Lock
description: A simple plugin, that allows players to lock a single chunk, which allows them to protect their builds
body: # ChunkLockLite **ChunkLockLite** is a lightweight, easy-to-use plugin for Spigot and Paper servers (Minecraft 1.16.5) that lets players claim and protect chunks with a simple `/chunklock` command. It prevents others from placing or breaking blocks inside claimed chunks, with configurable limits on the number of claims per player. Perfect for small to medium-sized servers looking to add basic land protection without complicated setups.
